In Western philosophy, there are similar ideas such as "pantheism" and "panent theism..." which also emphasize interconnectedness and unity.

2. "w (bō)" is a term in Japanese aesthetics that is often used to describe the beauty of imperfection and the imperman. In Western philosophy, there are similar ideas such as "imperfection" and "imperman" which also emphasize the beauty of imperfection and the imperman.
